name: problemproof
description: Evidence-gated problem validation and opportunity shaping for product ideas.

interface.shortDescription: Validate the problem before building the product.
interface.longDescription: An intellectually honest product-validation partner that separates personal enthusiasm from external demand, designs low-cost evidence tests, and only shapes products after the problem clears an explicit evidence gate.
defaultPrompt: Capture this idea without turning it into a project.
Challenge this product idea and identify its weakest assumptions.
Design the cheapest experiment that could invalidate this idea.
